title: mentha × schultziana var. diespasmena
intro: Mentha × schultziana var. diespasmena, also known as the 'Blue Peppermint', is a rare and lesser-known variety of peppermint that is native to parts of Europe and Asia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Mentha × schultziana var. diespasmena include relief from nausea, headaches, and respiratory issues, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
